title: HermitZombies
description: Let's turn your zombies into Hermits
body:
Hello there,

Thank you for considering this pack. Since I was bored of waiting for Season 11, I decided to turn my zombies into Hermits. 

I've written some code to extract the skins of the hermits, modify them to fit on a zombie and turned it into a resource pack. The pack requires the Entity Texture Feature mod and fabric and/or OptiFine in order to make use of the randomized zombie skins.
